name: Mojo 2
short_description: "Mojo 2” is a new version of the famous game “2048”, an original approach to this well-known puzzle. Several beautiful girls will keep you company during the game. The more points you get, the less clothes remain on the girls.
detailed_description:
Mojo 2: Mia (Free)

Before purchasing “Mojo 2”, it is recommended to test the free-of-charge version “Mojo 2: Mia”


About the Game

"Mojo 2” is a new version of the famous game “2048”, an original approach to this well-known puzzle. Several beautiful girls will keep you company during the game. The more points you get, the less clothes remain on the girls.
Will you be able to make them strip completely?

Differences from the first part:
  • The game doesn’t require consecutive completion: you may choose any level you wish.
  • Two new tiles have been added (128, 256).
  • New game mechanics (magnet, temporary “freezing” and dynamic field).
  • Game process fixation.
  • Having completed half of a level, you will get access to the next level. This will enable you to postpone the full completion of certain levels.
